metadata.direction: Kana reading → list of word IDs with that reading (IME-style reverse lookup).

field_notes.mapping: Each kana reading maps to all word IDs that include it as a kana writing. Use for dictionary-style lookup by pronunciation.

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/core/words.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
